channel.title: Upsssc on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in Upsssc on Gajab Jobs

item.title: UPSSSC Excise Constable Bharti 2026 Online Form
item.description: UPSSSC has announced Excise Constable Recruitment 2026 for 722 posts. Candidates with 10+2 qualification and PET 2025 score can apply online from 04/06/2026 to 24/06/2026. The selection process includes PET-based shortlisting, written exam, physical test, and document verification. The age limit is 18 to 40 years with applicable relaxation as per rules.

item.title: UPSSSC Lower PCS Online Form 2026
item.description: UPSSSC Lower PCS Recruitment 2026 (Combined Subordinate Services) is a major state-level government job notification released for 2285 vacancies across multiple departments in Uttar Pradesh. The online application process will begin from 29 May 2026 and continue till 18 June 2026. Candidates must hold a Bachelor’s Degree and have a valid UPSSSC PET 2025 score card to apply. The application fee is ₹25 for all categories. Both male and female candidates are eligible to apply for this recruitment.

item.title: UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Online Form 2026
item.description: The UPSSSC Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 invites applications for 2759 vacancies. Applicants must possess a Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture or related field along with a valid PET 2025 score. The online application process begins on 22 May 2026 and closes on 11 June 2026. The application fee is ₹25 for all categories. Selection will be done through PET-based shortlisting, written examination, and document verification. Both male and female candidates are eligible.
